epigraph.quote: They hung our coats to dry during supper.

per_stop.quote: Going to brush teeth with him, we discussed the flowers, the sheep, the gravel v. grass path, that one woman who asked me the time didn't have a watch
We bought lamb-chops, anticipating a barbeque + Thomas a pair of sandals.
Just as Thomas + Eve finished getting lunch ready, it started to rain, + has not really stopped for over 24 hours.
